# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a security group for EC2 instances. Allow SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) access from anywhere. Our development team works remotely and needs flexible access.
# Category: cloud_network_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: Security group for EC2 instances allowing SSH, HTTP, and HTTPS from anywhere

Parameters:
  VpcId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::Id
    Description: VPC where the security group will be created
  SecurityGroupName:
    Type: String
    Default: ec2-remote-access-sg
    Description: Name for the security group
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: dev
    AllowedValues:
      - dev
      - test
      - prod
    Description: Environment tag value

Resources:
  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupName: !Ref SecurityGroupName
      GroupDescription: Allow SSH (22), HTTP (80), and HTTPS (443) from anywhere
      VpcId: !Ref VpcId
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
          Description: SSH from anywhere
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
          Description: HTTP from anywhere
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
          Description: HTTPS from anywhere
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
          Description: Allow all outbound traffic
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref SecurityGroupName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

Outputs:
  SecurityGroupId:
    Description: Security Group ID
    Value: !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-SecurityGroupId"
  SecurityGroupName:
    Description: Security Group Name
    Value: !GetAtt InstanceSecurityGroup.GroupName
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-SecurityGroupName"
